calendar.matters:
Supplemental Account & Report Of Status Admin. Of Executor & Petition For Settlement Thereof
Off Calendar Oct-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Melissa Gabe for and with Barbara Smith (Executor). Thomas Huster for and with Alex Montiel (Residual Beneficiary).

The Parties addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes with regard to costs and expenses, the $1,000.00 payment made by the Executor to her Attorney, reimbursements made by the Executor to herself, the amount paid for the niche, payment to the Probate Referee, payment to the accountant, the length of time it took for the Executor to pay Mr. Montiel, the reduced amount of payment made to Mr. Montiel (not the amount as ordered), the amount of work it took on behalf of Mr. Huster for his Client to be paid the balance of the amount ordered, surcharge to the Executor for additional costs incurred, etc. The accounting petition will be deemed under submission as of September 30, 2013. The Court advised Ms. Gabe that a further declaration was needed laying what money she received from her Client and what expenses were paid. The Court also stated that there are to be no further expenses.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Freedman, For Extraordinary Services
Off Calendar Oct-26-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Melissa Gabe and Michael Freedman for Barbara Smith. Thomas Huster for and with Alejandro Montiel.

The Petition to Determine Distribution Rights, etc. was granted with the reserve amount reduced to $25,000.00 (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

Petition To Determine Distribution Rights [Probate Code Sec 11700], First And Final Account And Report Of Executor And Petition For Settlement Thereof, For Allowance Of Compensation For Executor And For Ordinary And Extraordinary Services Of Executor'S Attorney And For Final Distribution, And Petition For Allowance Of Compensation To Litigation Attorney, Michael E. Freedman, For Extraordinary Services
Off Calendar Aug-15-2012 Continued To Oct-24-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Barbara Smith (Executor). Thomas Huster for and with Alex Montiel (Objector).

The Court noted that there are factual, legal and emotional issues, and asked the Parties if they were interested in mediation. Counsel agreed that they will need a short (one hour) evidentiary hearing and also agreed to participate in Pro Bono Mediation. The order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation was signed in open Court. Mediation is to be completed by October 10, 2012. The Parties are to report to the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by October 17, 2012. The Petition to Determine Distribution Rights, etc. was continued to October 24, 2012 at 9:00 a.m, in Dept. 204 for status on mediation as well as the pending petition going forward with the expectation that any further filings (supplemental accounting, points and authorities, briefs, reply to objections) are filed by that date.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Gomez.

Off Calendar Jun-04-2012 Continued To Jul-02-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Thomas Huster for and with Alex Montiel (Moving Party). Michael Freedman for and with Barbara Smith.

Mr. Freedman stated that the accounting was completed and expected to be filed within several days, that it will be filed as final account and that distribution will be made. The Petition for Removal of Representative was continued to July 2, 2012 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the expectation that a Petition for Final Distribution will be filed by then. The Parties are to work on some dates to look at the personal property that is in storage.
